title: AI Software Factory Project Config
description: Machine-readable project configuration written by /foundation:init and read by all commands. Single source of truth for architectural choices.

projectName.description: Project name in kebab-case. Used in package.json and display.

initDate.description: Date the project was initialized (ISO 8601 date).

multiTenant.description: Whether the project uses organisation-based multi-tenancy. When true: tenant_id on business tables, tenant-scoped RLS, onboarding flow. When false: role-based access only.

authModel.description: Authentication model. supabase-auth: email/password + OAuth via Supabase Auth. keycloak: OIDC via Keycloak for AD/LDAP environments.

regulated.description: Whether the project operates in a regulated industry.

regulationType.description: Specific regulation type. Null when regulated is false.

auditTrail.description: Whether audit logging is enabled. Defaults to true for all projects.

status.description: Project lifecycle status. initializing: init completed. discovering: discover in progress. active: ready for feature development. archived: no longer active.
